action.thought_summary: After 19 turns, the user has consistently responded with uncertainty to most specific questions. The confirmed requirements are limited to: two roles (admin and regular users), admin manages scenic spots (CRUD) and user records and replies to messages, regular users register/login/manage profiles and send messages to admin, and the color scheme is mint background with dark sea green components. With the turn budget nearly exhausted and the user unable to provide further specifics, it's time to finish.
action.finish_summary: Elicited requirements for the tourism management website: (1) Two user roles: administrators and regular users. (2) Administrators can manage scenic spots (add, delete, modify, query), manage user records, and reply to messages from users. (3) Regular users can register, log in, manage their own profiles, and send messages to administrators. (4) Messaging system supports user-to-admin communication with admin replies. (5) Visual style: mint color background with dark sea green components. Many detailed decisions regarding scenic spot fields, user browsing permissions, message structure, layout patterns, and UI specifics remain unspecified by the user.
